com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.tools

Class ArrayBuilder

  • Object
    • com.xilinx.rapidwright.design.tools.ArrayBuilder

  • public class ArrayBuilder
extends Object
    A Tool to optimize, place and route a kernel and then replicate its implementation in an array across the fabric.
